description: T1 transposed contraction. The programmer intends Q @ K^T with Q : (B,H,T,D) and K : (B,H,T,D); the bug version receives a Q laid out (B,T,H,D) and the resulting attention matrix is the wrong tensor.
intended_output_construction: softmax(Q.einsum('bhtd, bhsd -> bhts', K) / sqrt(D), dim=-1)
